attacks.text: Atrium sample size: only 7 Sk atrial samples. WGCNA on n=23 total is borderline. Module stability at n=7/group questionable.
Batch confound: batch1=59, batch2=12. Must verify batch not confounded with species. All-sample network included batch covariate; subsets could not.
Unsigned network merges up/down genes into same module. A shared module could be artifact of genes going in opposite directions.
Power=4 forced (auto-pick was 1). Forcing 4 may create artificial structure.
Animal pseudoreplication: 12 animal_ids across 71 samples. Paired design, not fully independent.

confounders.name: species_vs_heart_rate
confounders.text: With only 3 species (2 high-rate, 1 low-rate), species identity and heart rate are perfectly confounded. Cannot distinguish convergent evolution from shared ancestry.

confounders.name: batch_effect
confounders.text: batch1=59, batch2=12. Subsets cannot include batch covariate.

diagnostic_tests.name: module_preservation
diagnostic_tests.text: Test Sk<->Sm module preservation. If Z>2, modules are preserved across species.

diagnostic_tests.name: power_sensitivity
diagnostic_tests.text: Run WGCNA at power=1,4,6 to check module stability.

diagnostic_tests.name: signed_network
diagnostic_tests.text: Re-run with signed network to check if unsigned merging creates artifacts.

verdict: H2 (ventricular convergence) is strongest testable hypothesis. H1 (atrial) should be attempted but may fail on sample size. H7 (null) must be reported alongside.

attacks.text: 心房样本量不足：Sk 心房仅 7 个样本，n=23 的 WGCNA 处于边界，模块稳定性存疑
批次混淆：batch1=59, batch2=12，需验证批次与物种不混淆
无符号网络：上调和下调基因合并到同一模块，共享模块可能是基因方向相反的假象
强制 power=4：自动选择为 1，强制 4 可能制造人工结构
动物伪重复：12 个 animal_id 跨 71 个样本，配对设计非完全独立

confounders.name: 批次效应
confounders.text: batch1=59, batch2=12，子集无法包含批次协变量

confounders.name: 物种 vs 心率混淆
confounders.text: 三物种设计中物种与心率完全混淆，无法分离

diagnostic_tests.name: table(species, chamber, batch)
diagnostic_tests.text: 检查批次与物种/腔室的混淆

diagnostic_tests.name: 模块保存性 Zsummary
diagnostic_tests.text: Sk vs Sm 保存性检验

diagnostic_tests.name: signed network 对比
diagnostic_tests.text: 验证 unsigned 模块是否为假象

cn.verdict: H2（心室趋同）是最强可检验假设。H1（心房）应尝试但可能因样本量失败。H7（零假设）必须同时报告。
